exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (120, 660). Other element would receive the click:

...

(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.57) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [9472a873c0b1f246e26b8c9787763cf5, clickElement {id=f.386E435B1BB706BB76134535E602E08D.d.200A35AA36FFE20C298A6869748B9405.e.41}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.57, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\BHAVYA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:63313}, goog:processID: 14372, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:63313/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.57, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (9472a873c0b1f246e26b8c9787763cf5)] -> link text: Log out] Session ID: 9472a873c0b1f246e26b8c9787763cf5
